scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @cloud-resume-v2/contracts && npm run build --workspace @cloud-resume-v2/frontend-core
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:web
scripts.validate: npm run docs:validate && python3 scripts/lint_agents.py && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && bash scripts/validate-dist.sh apps/web/dist
